name: team-skills
description: Shared Claude Code skills and engineering methods for The AI Consulting Lab.

plugins.name: card-estimate
plugins.description: TACL house skill: estimate and break down work into sized, ClickUp-ready cards using the team's Fibonacci + flow-metrics method.

plugins.name: transcribe
plugins.description: Transcribe video from any URL (YouTube, Instagram, X/Twitter, TikTok, Facebook, Vimeo, etc.) into text using yt-dlp and faster-whisper.

plugins.name: release-notes
plugins.description: Cut a release: the technical changelog, the client-facing release note as a branded Word doc, the git tag and the GitHub Release. Project-agnostic — shared logic, per-repo vocabulary and branding.
